course.name: AI training for executives
course.description: Lead your organisation's AI transformation with method. Strategy, governance and augmented decision-making for executives and boards.

hero.title: Lead the AI transformation
hero.description: Neither a technical introduction nor a trends conference. Training to decide: where to go, how to get there, what to expect from your teams and your vendors.

rows.label: Format
rows.value: Online or in person, from half a day

problemSolution.title: The challenges executives face in the AI transformation
problemSolution.intro: AI transformation is a strategic decision, not a technical one. It requires a clear vision, a governance framework and the ability to evaluate what is worth investing in.

rows.problem: You know AI will transform your sector, but you don't know where to start or what to delegate.
rows.solutionTitle: A clear vision and a roadmap
rows.solutionDesc: Understand the real strengths and limitations of AI to make informed decisions about where to invest and where not to.

rows.problem: Your teams use AI in a scattered way, without a common framework or clear policy.
rows.solutionDesc: Put in place usage policies, confidentiality rules and a supervision framework your teams can apply.

rows.problem: You cannot evaluate the AI projects proposed to you or measure their real return.
rows.solutionDesc: Learn to evaluate an AI project, identify overstated promises and measure the real return on investment of your initiatives.

items.title: Understanding AI in order to decide
items: What AI can and cannot actually do
Overview of high-ROI use cases for your sector
Evaluating an AI solution without technical skills
The real risks: bias, hallucinations, vendor lock-in

items.title: AI governance and policy
items: Building an AI usage policy for your teams
Managing data confidentiality and GDPR compliance
Supervision and output quality control framework
Internal communications around the AI transformation

items.title: Strategy and organisational transformation
items: Identifying the processes to automate first
Building a step-by-step AI transformation plan
Measuring ROI and defining relevant KPIs

pricing.title: Adapted to your organisation
pricing.description: We adapt the training to your sector, your organisation and your specific challenges. Individual session, board programme or team seminar.

card.label: Format
card.heading: Tailored
card.subtitle: In-house sessions · Pricing based on format

faq.title: What executives ask before signing up

items.question: Is the training suited to non-technical participants?
items.answer: That is precisely its objective. Not a single line of code, no technical jargon. Only what an executive needs to decide and govern.

items.question: Can we organise a session for our entire board?
items.answer: Yes. That is the most common format for this training. We adapt the practical cases to your sector and specific challenges.

items.question: How long before results are visible?
items.answer: Most participants put the first governance measures in place within two weeks of training. More structural transformations take 3 to 6 months.

items.question: Does the training cover specific tools?
items.answer: We cover the main tool categories relevant to your sector, without any commercial bias. The objective is to give you evaluation criteria, not to sell you a particular tool.

ctaFinal.title: A 20-minute conversation to calibrate your programme
ctaFinal.description: Every organisation has different challenges. Let's talk to define the format and content that fits your situation.
